content:
Is very frequent that there are a lot of different events all present at 1 time, either new or old ones that aren't even accessible anymore, creating a lot of clutter and confusion.

Would be possible to separate events that have a gameplay component like the Raid, the Reruns or New unit event etc, and the ones that are just passive rewards? Like the login or awakening rewards.

So that people can actually find new important events easier.
A collapsible selection would be useful, but even just a graphical separation with the events with gameplay mission on the top and the ones with passive rewards at the bottom could be good.
说的就是300普抽养成，以及几个常驻模式的100级里程碑，无人刷满。meantime，沉淀和集中代币溢出数万一直没说法。可与其整这种投入产出极度不成正比的闹剧一般的素材回收系统，那还不如就溢出着算了，累了。

Morimens doesn't run on a strict patch clock. The update pacing has recently slowed down from a 4-week to a 6-week cycle. Naturally, these kinds of delays will cause shifts in the upcoming schedule, but right now the timeline feels unpredictable for the players. 

A clear example of this is the current Saya collab banner lasting for a full 3 months. Why does she receive this kind of extended treatment when others like Mouchette and previous half-anni characters did not? This may make players worry that original content is being delayed or put on hold.

If production constraints are causing these changes, providing a flexible roadmap would go a long way in clearing up community anxiety and letting players know how devs are choosing to prioritize new features and/or backlog. 

For example, something like the following:

v2.5 (Target: May)
 * New Awakener: Arachne
 * Saya collaboration
 * Remaining implementation of AA
 * Balance patches
 * Mechanic to upgrade standard units
 * New UI
 * Half-anni events A, B, C

 v2.6 (Target: August)
 * New Awakener: Caraboo
 * 1-2 additional new awakeners
 * Main Story Chapter Update
 * X changes planned for existing feature A
 * Y changes planned for existing feature B
Something general could be implemented, but I do fear that if they say something and then, for any reason, there is a change, people will be even more angry because they see it as an hard promise.
players can understand roadmaps are flexible, not definitive schedule
Mmmmmh, if they do that i would at least make sure they really emphasize that it is a theoretical timeline for the plans

I echo that sentiment and the suggestion proposed
As a new player especially it is annoying to have no clue what's ahead
i mean we USED to have a roadmap

The Image of some awakeners is not shown in the communication visual during story, this is Chapter 7 as an example.

我是韓國用戶。

我很想購買完成每個故事後可以獲得的限時道具，

但我目前經濟狀況不佳，無力購買。

因此，我不得不暫停遊戲。

請問貴公司是否有計劃解決這個問題？

I really want to buy the limited-time item obtainable by completing the story, but my current financial situation is poor, so I cannot afford to purchase it.

That is why I have paused the game.

Do you plan to make this item available permanently or resolve this issue?


각 스토리를 완료하면 얻을 수 있는 기간 한정 아이템들을 정말 사고 싶은데,
현재 재정 상황이 좋지 않아 구매할 여력이 없습니다.
그래서 게임을 일시 중지한 상태입니다.
혹시 이 문제를 해결할 계획이 있으신가요?
Regarding the story sales package

first,u can play this game totally free.second,stop spend money in this game.This game has basically no new content. It's taken six weeks to release a new character twice in a row. If this happened in any other game, players would already be expecting shutdown news.

There is only 1 type of limited paid package when you complete story chapters, but is not soo high value to really be that bad to miss.
There are other lower price deals that are better.
Plus yeah, you don't have to really spend much in this game.

If users do not spend money, this game will once again face the crisis of service termination.

I would like to purchase the story package, and its contents look excellent.

However, it is very unfortunate that I have to stop progressing through the story because I do not have the money to buy it right now. I am asking the developer because I am curious if they can improve this aspect.

I'm sorry if it's hard to read because I'm not good at English.
if you do want to spend, there are currently packs that are alot more valuable than the ones from story
the temporary story ones are good, but not that good
plus, if don't have money to buy them anyway, is really not worth to skip story just for the option to take them, they are really not THAT good compared to other options
like the monthly pass or even the battle pass for the special wheels

Most Koreans have a culture of comparing game packages to gacha tickets to calculate the cost-effectiveness before sharing their findings.

To maximize efficiency,
the packages provided upon clearing the story are excellent items.

Korean users strongly dislike missing out on these.
I simply want to hear the developer's opinion on whether or not they intend to sell it without a time limit.

If they have no intention of improving it,
I have to make a choice.
Whether to proceed with the story and just discard the item,

or stop progressing through the story until I earn money.
I would like to show you the billing efficiency calculation table, but I cannot share it as I did not create it myself.

However, I would appreciate your understanding that these efficiency figures were not calculated without basis.
I clearly calculate and understand the level of efficiency involved.

I have no intention of forcing this issue.

I just want to know if the developer intends to improve it.

I see that you don’t want to miss out the time-limited packages. However, I think there are other packages which are unlocked with the story mode gradually unfolded, which are not time-limited. I think there are at least two packages like this, so I don’t think the dev would consider make another story mode related packages without time limit. Also, time-limited packages which are unlocked by story mode are a type of package itself, you can see this in some other Japanese gacha games, so it would be not very accurate to say that this is an issue which still needs improvement; rather, I’ll consider the time limitations as the main point of these packages.

Echoed Pilgrimage is clearly one of the most efficient package to get cores, which Light is aware of as well. He also said that he would offer opportunities to those who couldn't buy due to time limits in the future.
If answer is "no", he just has to slow down the story mode progress, but you guys seem to convince him to give up.

Because if that is completely time free too, what’s the point of Milestone Special packages at all?

And why do you think we are convincing OP to give up, not convincing OP to slow down? Of course I’m convincing they to just slow down.

But yes, I’m convincing they not to see the time limitations are a bug of those packages, that’s more like a feature of those packages.

為什麼不花時間去想新的遊戲流程，反而浪費時間在做出（貓的報復）這種一點遊戲性也沒有，純粹噁心人讓人去浪費時間拿獎勵，從開服到現在唯一有改變遊戲玩法就是把忘卻篇規則改成星塵篇，如果不打pvp的情況下，把融災獎勵拿完和角色活動打完就直接下了，pve從開服到現在唯一的遊戲性只侷限於關卡的難度，幻夢深潛和列車真的有人覺得好玩嗎，幻夢就靠著運氣追求隊伍的上限，讓人重開無數次凹到最好的情況，正反饋像在寫一題數學題解出正確答案一樣，還他馬的解完要刮彩票，刮中了才算對；列車更是堆史之作啊，隊伍靠著造物給的數值，去解決很數值的關卡，關卡還又臭又長啊。

為什麽不能參考一下別的遊戲的肉鴿玩法，像明日方舟，我自己參考的想的玩法，開局抽4個喚醒體基礎0啟60等（命輪、密契等看自己的練度），進入遊戲階段，打完關卡或路上有事件拿獎勵，獎勵在角色、造物、回血、覺醒等之類的，獎勵角色如果原本就有了就能升級3啟70等超限80最終90依此類推，新的喚醒體就基礎60等，進入關卡前可以重編隊伍，重編隊伍的血量以上次隊伍血量的百分比一樣，超維保留空間到下個隊伍有超維角色在顯示一樣的上次留存的空間，血肉熔爐一樣以百分比判定，死扛看上次爆幾次，下次使用的隊伍也以爆幾次的情況顯示，其他細節再看看吧。
问就是没产能😾

同意單調，不認同你的想法
遊戲性本身就不在忘卻篇星辰篇那些區別，真要說早期忘卻篇活動關卡還都比你提的重複刷關有趣
懷疑策劃組只有🐱一個
單調是很單調，但打貓關跟列車很好玩啊⋯⋯奇奇怪怪的關卡特性跟平常不可能組滿的造物build，我覺得滿好玩的⋯⋯

Yes I pulled Saya and then decided to play Saya no Uta, yep, that's me, my bad I guess, don't want that thing on my account anymore. Mine is a situation that can happen to, well... a small amount of silly people i guess, but more ways to get an Origin of Time would help a lot in dealing with occasional regret, especially since it's more likely to happen with collab characters and we will see more of those.

Also, one copy of hers is given for free, would be nice to have some way of avoiding that too, a choice to pick something else as a reward, idk.
Yes to this, but PSA Origin of Time doesn't work on limited awakeners, unless it's to revert skill points and levels.

TRULY
Because limited selectors are pretty big
well yeah they are nice, but surely for like 3000 sediment things can be worked out

Are they though? Since 10 overflow copies of standards (or 5 of limited) grant a limited selector (capped at 3 per month) they aren't that uncommon for a whale anymore and within reach for long-term players who finish a realm up and keep pushing their standard cores into it. It's less than 300 standard cores for a limited selector for anyone who finished up a realm (maybe a little more if you are lucky and get a limited in standards, and much less if you have all those +12 as well) it's not such a luxury item as it used to be anymore imho

yeah, i mean that if you have a limited you don't want and maybe found at random, resetting it for possibly 4 limited selectors is very very good.
They could do it in a controlled way etc, and it would be nice, but also a pretty rare mechanic to find in most gacha, so not too hopeful.

I guess you can use origin of time on limited awakeners. It’s just that it won’t return a “piece” for you to choose a standard awakeners of your choice, only return the resources you used to level up the awakener and their skill

So you can level up her to lv60, make her like you, gather all the cores and silvers she can give you, and then use origin of time on her.

I noticed that some cards description have effects that should be present only on higher Enlightenments but are present even if you are on a lower one.

As an example, Pollux E3 makes this card activate the next used 2 times, but i only have E1.
The same is also true for Gdoll special 0 cost cards you get after the 10 stacks of Finale. 
So is possible that is a wide reaching problem, because others have reported similar anomalies on other units.

Please fix this to prevent confusion of new players too.
